productDisplayName: John Players Men Red Gingham Shirt
description: Style Notejohn players will have you spoilt for choice when it comes to casual options with this comfortable and stylish checked shirt. Paired with comfortable chinos or jeans, they add quite the splash of colour and trend to your look. This shirt comes from their Retro Beat collection known for the use of bold and bright colours.Product DetailsA shirt with white and red checks, short sleeves, a spread collar, full buttoned placket and a patch pocket with rounded corners on the left chest Material and CareCotton richMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry low or dry in shade inside outUse warm ironSize and FitJohn Players' trim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
